resources:
CoreGuard Occult wards. Modern defense. Your device, sealed beneath the Sigillum Dei
Guardian Score Tap the shield for the full ritual of checks AEGIS WARDED EXPOSED BREACHED
Device Vitals Memory CPU Usage CPU: Measuring… CPU: %1$d%%
<<<<<<< HEAD View Security Dashboard Open Network Defense Lab Upgrade to Premium (Demo) ======= Enter the Sanctum Nemesis Scanner Forge Premium (Demo) Back
Refresh signatures Fetching latest threat signatures… ✓ %1$d signatures loaded — tap Run Privacy Check to rescan Refresh failed: %1$s
Nemesis Scanner A privacy integrity check for your device — defending your right to private communication. Run Privacy Check Checking device against %1$d privacy signatures… PRIVACY INTACT POSSIBLE PRIVACY RISK PRIVACY THREAT FOUND %1$d items checked · %2$d signatures · %3$d ms Nothing flagged on this device. A clean result is reassuring but not a guarantee — a full off-device analysis is more thorough. Findings Privacy signatures sourced from the Amnesty International Security Lab / mvt-project. CoreGuard is an independent project and is not affiliated with Amnesty International.
Privacy Shield Blocks connections to servers known to track or surveil, using a private on-device VPN. Off On · %1$d blocked Privacy Shield needs VPN permission to run.
Privacy Integrity >>>>>>> origin/main
Network Defense Lab Prototype teaching simulation — not live network monitoring or IPS. Interactive 16-node network topology Attack BFS Attack DFS Defend Cascade Rollback MST Protanopia Nothing to roll back Healthy %1$d · Compromised %2$d · Defended %3$d · Steps %4$d Selected: %1$s · Vision: %2$s · MST: %3$s Events: — Last: %1$s — %2$s
The Sanctum Five wards stand between your device and harm ALL WARDS HOLD WARDS WEAKENED WARD BROKEN PASS WARN FAIL
Forge Premium CoreGuard Premium Stay ahead of spyware. Private. Always guarded. Automated daily security scans Threat report export — share findings with your team Live signature updates — new threats detected faster Your privacy. Your device. Your control. ⚠️ DEMO BUILD: No real payment is processed. This screen is a placeholder for Google Play Billing integration. Take the Oath (Demo) Not now ✅ Demo purchase simulated. No real payment was made. Purchase cancelled. Error: %1$s
Decorative Enochian protection seal Guardian score shield
